positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical illustration of a mystical, celestial creature (e.g., a phoenix or griffin) emerging from vibrant nebula clouds. The creature should feature elegant, stylized feathers and strong, flowing lines. The composition must be central, with the main subject filling the frame dramatically. Use a palette of deep indigo, cosmic violet, ethereal gold, and luminous cyan. Style should be a blend of Art Nouveau aesthetics and vibrant psychedelic psychedelia, resulting in clean, sharp vector-like silhouettes. Focus on high contrast and deep blacks contrasted with glowing neon accents. Minimal background details, maximizing the silhouette impact. Perfect for a t-shirt print.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, noise, jpeg artifacts, out of frame, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy lines, low quality, poorly drawn, cartoon, grayscale, photographic, realistic photo, signature
